Class SummaryMenu

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
javafx.scene.layout.VBox
gui.SummaryMenu
All Implemented Interfaces:
RunAfterChange, javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class SummaryMenu extends javafx.scene.layout.VBox implements RunAfterChange
Represents the summary menu UI.

      private void initUi()
      Initializes the UI components for the summary menu.

    • createSummaryRow

      private ArrayList<javafx.scene.control.Label> createSummaryRow(String rowText, String styleId, javafx.scene.layout.GridPane gridPane, int rowIndex, int columnIndex)
      Helper method for creating summary information UI
      Parameters:
      rowText - Text of the row
      styleId - CSS style ID to apply to the text
      gridPane - GridPane to add the row to
      rowIndex - Row index to add the information to
      columnIndex - Column index to add the information to
      Returns:
      Label for SummaryMenu UI update

    • createContinueButton

      private javafx.scene.control.Button createContinueButton()
      Creates the continue button to proceed to the next day.
      Returns:
      the continue button

    • updateUi

      public void updateUi()
      Updates the UI with the latest game statistics.

    • setSummaryUI

      private void setSummaryUI(ArrayList<javafx.scene.control.Label> summaryLabelList, String displayText, String valueText)
      Helper method to update the summary UI using given info.
      Parameters:
      summaryLabelList - List of summary information labels
      displayText - Display text of the information
      valueText - String that represents the value of the information

    • playTranslateTransitionY

      private void playTranslateTransitionY(javafx.scene.Node node, double fromValue, double toValue, double timeSecond)
      Plays translate transition for the Summary Menu UI components.
      Parameters:
      node - Node that needs to be translated
      fromValue - Initial value of translation
      toValue - Final value of translation
      timeSecond - Translate duration in second
